examples: As the great contemporary poet and dramatist Ben Jonson said, "He was not of an age, but for all time."
Was Ben Jonson contemporary with Shakespeare?
"Every man, that writes in verse is not a Poet" (Ben Jonson).
His only alleged connection to the plays came seven years after his death in the tribute by Ben Jonson in the First Folio.
It is Jonson in my text, but is this a misprint?
